name: Red Chili Biscuits
recipeInstructions:
1. Stir together the dry baking mix, chili powder, red pepper flakes, dried chili peppers, and cheese until well combined.
2. Add the sourdough starter and mix until the dough is moistened but still slightly crumbly.
3. Place the mixture on a floured surface and knead lightly for about 30 seconds.
4. Pat the dough into an even layer that is approximately 1/2 inch thick.
5. Cut out biscuits using a 2 1/2-inch cutter, pressing firmly to ensure even thickness.
6. Transfer the biscuits to a greased baking sheet.
7. Bake in a preheated oven at 350°F for 20 to 25 minutes or until golden brown and lightly crisp.
